title: Field-Level Validation
breadcrumbs: Validation at Field, Key, Occurrence, or Entity Level
text: Field-Level Validation Validation of a field can be initiated the validatefield ProcScript statement, by an event that changes focus, or by cascading validation from a higher level of the component or application. The conditions for field validation are either: Field data has been modified, and the field has not yet been validated successfully, or Validation is demanded for the field by setting $fieldcheck . Validation Process The process for validating a field is as follows: Uniface carries out declarative checks for the field, based on the field syntax, data type, and ValRep lists. Uniface activates the validate trigger for the field, and executes procedural validation ProcScript written in the trigger. Related Links validatefield Validate a field of the current occurrence. $fieldcheck Return or set the requirement for field validation. Data Types Data types are classifications for data containers, such as fields, variables, parameters, and return values. They define the characteristics of the data and determine how the data is handled during processing and storage. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
